name: llmbda-ts
description: A TypeScript reference implementation of the LLMbda calculus (Garby, Gordon, Sands 2026) — a labeled, dynamically information-flow-tracked lambda calculus for agentic LLM programs. NOT a proof: the noninterference theorem (TIPNI) is machine-checked only in the paper's Lean development. This port re-implements the operational semantics and tests the security-critical rules against the paper's own leak examples, but carries no formal guarantee.
